metadata.title: EdGen FSTC 2026 300% AMI county map data
metadata.source: HUD FY 2026 Section 8 Income Limits Excel uploaded as Section8-FY26.xlsx
metadata.method: For each county GEOID, use the HUD FY 2026 median2026 value multiplied by 3. If HUD reports multiple areas inside one county, the map displays a range and colors the county by the highest 300% AMI value in that county.
metadata.disclaimer: For informational planning only. Final FSTC scholarship eligibility will depend on federal law, IRS/Treasury guidance, SGO review, income verification, state participation, and final program rules.
